title: HKI
description: A lightweight pack mainly focused on Create and its addons. Build machines, automate farms, and design creative factories with expanded tools and mechanics.
body:
**HKI Modpack**

This pack expands the world of Create with powerful and creative addons that take contraptions to the next level. Whether you’re an engineer, builder, or adventurer, these extensions give you fresh ways to automate, decorate, and explore.

**Featured Addons**

* **Create Connected** – Streamline multiplayer factories with better logistics and connections, making co-op engineering smoother than ever.
* **Create Crafts & Additions** – Add new power sources and tools, including electrical machinery, giving your builds more variety and progression options.
* **Create: Copycats+** – Perfect for builders! Easily disguise mechanical parts with stylish block variants, keeping your contraptions both functional and beautiful.
* **Create: Structures Arise** – Bring your world to life with naturally generating Create-themed structures, offering both inspiration and resources for your machines.

Together, these addons create a balanced mix of utility, aesthetics, and exploration—perfect for anyone who wants more than just gears and shafts. Build advanced systems, design stunning contraptions, or uncover mechanical wonders scattered across your world.
